domainDescription: Comprehensive agentic-stack ontology and catalog covering NodeKinds, EdgeKinds, examples, generators, encyclopedia, tests, SDK, and operator surfaces. Source of truth: a graph ontology from which downstream code, docs, and tools are derived. Currently has ~123 NodeKinds, ~190+ EdgeKinds, ~1500+ example YAML files spanning 15 clusters. Symphony SPEC concepts (workspaces, run attempts, live sessions, observability surfaces, issue trackers, failure recovery) recently landed in Wave-18; Trust Chain is explicitly OUT OF SCOPE.
forbiddenChanges: Trust Chain — Authority/Attestation/trust-interface concepts are OUT OF SCOPE for the entire catalog. Do not propose, add, or extend Trust Chain entities or edges in any phase.
No new wave-N / batch-N / round-N / iteration-N filenames. Use semantic naming.
Phase-* lifecycle vocabulary files (canonical) must not be split or renamed.
preferredCollapsePrecedents: 2026-04-29 remodel collapsed Hook, HookFamily, ChannelKind, Modality, TermKind from NodeKinds to enums (precedent A.1-A.5).
Wave-17 collapsed OutputFormat / IOSurface / AgentMemory / NotificationChannel / HumanReadableStatusSurface to enum extensions instead of NodeKinds.
ApprovalPolicy + SandboxPolicy already exist as enums on AgentRuntimeImpl + a Sandbox NodeKind — do not re-reify.

knownOpenAreas: Encyclopedia (Phase 4 home) — not started; spec exists at 06-derivation-spec.md
InteractionPattern populated (8 canonical patterns) but more needed
Cluster-9 (domain) Platform/PlatformService recently added — examples thin in some platforms
completedWavesThisCycle: Wave-15: 28 Role->SkillArea edges + 25 new Roles + 24 Responsibilities + 10 OrgUnits
Wave-16: Platform/PlatformService NodeKinds + 5 edges + 19 cloud-primitive StackParts + 8 SkillAreas + 10 Platforms + 65 PlatformServices + 14 benchmark covers
Wave-17: 17 benchmarks + 11 SkillAreas + 7 interaction-primitive NodeKinds + 8 enums + 5 edges + 37 examples + 40 wave-* files restructured into 111 semantic files (765 ids conserved)
Wave-18: 20 application-layer NodeKinds + 10 enums + 14 edges + 49 examples sourced from Symphony SPEC

strategicContext.northStar: Graph thorough enough to write a full wiki/encyclopedia on the entire agent-engineering domain.
downstreamDerivations: Encyclopedia (Phase 4) — full wiki derived from graph queries
Test infrastructure (Phase 5) — coverage, evidence boundaries, versioning, CI/CD
